v8:item.v8:content: Metreon FZCO Dubai, United Arab Emirates DAFZA Building 4WB (West Side), Office 340 PO Box # 5430 b2b@metreon.store

Term & Conditions: We only accept the payment from the invoiced party. 1. All goods remain the property of Metreon FZCO until payment is received in full. 2. Metreon FZCO is the sole & Legal owner of the goods sold & that it holds full & unencumbered title of The goods & reserves the right to withhold the goods if they are not paid as terms specified in the Performa Invoice or invoice. 3. There shall be no price bargain once the goods are sold 4. Goods will be released only after full payment is being credited to the account of Metreon FZCO 5. Any deposit made is non-refundable if customers cancel the sale deal. 6. If the customer eventually backs out from the sale deal, the deposit will be non-refundable. 7. Transfer charges will be bear by customers.Metreon accept online payments 8. All the terms & conditions will be governed under UAE/international law. Any deposit made is nonrefundable if the sale deal is canceled by customer. Note.Metreon accepting only online payments
